# Application Management Control

Observe existing OCI AppMgmt Control monitored instances from Kubernetes with a bind-existing, controller-backed read-only contract.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `appmgmtcontrol` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-appmgmtcontrol-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-appmgmtcontrol:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-appmgmtcontrol-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to MonitoredInstance while monitoring-plugin activation, top-process metrics publishing, and workrequest helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime is bind-existing and observe-only: direct binds preflight `instanceId`, list-based binds require exact `compartmentId` plus `displayName`, and the runtime reruns `GetMonitoredInstance` after list adoption so status projects the full body.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
